name: forum-pod-desktop
description: Tauri installer that bundles workerd + the Forum Personal Pod PWA.

scripts.prepare:pod: cd ../forum-pod && npm install && npm run build && rm -rf ../desktop/src-tauri/dist && cp -r dist ../desktop/src-tauri/dist
scripts.prepare:airlock: mkdir -p src-tauri/airlock && cp ../forum-airlock/secure-worker.js src-tauri/airlock/ && cp ../forum-airlock/pod-do.js src-tauri/airlock/ && cp ../forum-airlock/pod-signing-web.js src-tauri/airlock/ && cp ../forum-airlock/session-binding.js src-tauri/airlock/ && cp ../forum-airlock/unlock-token.js src-tauri/airlock/ && cp ../forum-airlock/rate-limit.js src-tauri/airlock/ && cp ../forum-airlock/do-guards.js src-tauri/airlock/ && cp ../forum-airlock/webauthn-server.js src-tauri/airlock/ && cp ../forum-airlock/feedback-limits.js src-tauri/airlock/ && cp ../forum-airlock/secret-compare.js src-tauri/airlock/ && cp ../forum-airlock/member-hash.js src-tauri/airlock/ && cp ../forum-airlock/membership-verify.js src-tauri/airlock/ && cp ../forum-airlock/membership-routes.js src-tauri/airlock/ && cp ../forum-airlock/pod-sync.js src-tauri/airlock/
scripts.prepare: npm run prepare:pod && npm run prepare:airlock
